title: EEE-Bench 开放题
rewritten_question_text: In the single-phase rectifier shown in the image, consisting of three thyristors \(T_1\), \(T_2\), \(T_3\) and a diode \(D_1\), the circuit feeds power to a \(10 \, \text{A}\) constant current load. \(T_1\) and \(T_3\) are fired at \(\alpha = 60^\circ\) and \(T_2\) is fired at \(\alpha = 240^\circ\). The reference for \(\alpha\) is the positive zero crossing of \(V_{\text{in}}\). The average voltage \(V_o\) across the load in volts is ____ (Round off to 2 decimal places).

title: EEE-Bench 开放题
rewritten_question_text: Question: Replacing the circuit shown in figure (a) with the equivalent current source shown in figure, the parameters of the current source are \( I_S = \) ________ A.

title: EEE-Bench 开放题
rewritten_question_text: The switches T1 and T2 in (a) are switched in a complementary fashion with sinusoidal pulse width modulation technique. The modulating voltage \( v_m(t) = 0.8 \sin(200\pi t) V \) and the triangular carrier voltage \( v_c \) are as shown in (b). The carrier frequency is 5 kHz. The peak value of the 100 Hz component of the load current \( i_L \), in ampere, is ______.

title: EEE-Bench 开放题
rewritten_question_text: In the transistor amplifier circuit shown in the image, the transistor has the following parameters: \( \beta_{DC} = 60 \), \( V_{BE} = 0.7V \), \( h_{ie} \rightarrow \infty \), \( h_{fe} \rightarrow \infty \). The capacitance \( C_c \) can be assumed to be infinite. Under DC conditions, the collector-to-emitter voltage drop is ( ) Volts.

title: EEE-Bench 开放题
rewritten_question_text: A Boolean digital circuit is composed using two 4-input multiplexers (M1 and M2) and one 2-input multiplexer (M3) as shown in the figure. X0-X7 are the inputs of the multiplexers M1 and M2 and could be connected to either 0 or 1. The select lines of the multiplexers are connected to Boolean variables A, B, and C as shown in the figure. What set of values of (X0, X1, X2, X3, X4, X5, X6, X7) will realize the Boolean function \( \overline{A} + \overline{A} \cdot \overline{C} + A \cdot \overline{B} \cdot C \)?

expected_answer: The critical value of \( K \) decreases.
